case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO /TAX COLLECTOR VS. PEDRO CHAVEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO /TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, PEDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $45.50 - SERVED SEP-14-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, PEDRO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO /TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY YOLANDA ARENAS--SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO /TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, PEDRO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT /SENT TO DEFENDANT UNABLE TO FORWARD.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO /TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, PEDRO
